_meta.purpose: App Store Connect upload payload — copy-paste sections during Day 7 submission

version_information.promotional_text_170char: Free 3 reveals/month. One photo, 60s, directional read with no invented numbers. Honest about what we can and can't see. Subscribe for unlimited.
version_information.whats_new_in_this_version:
Initial release.

• 3 free reveals per month — try before you subscribe
• 1-photo meal reveals with 0-100 directional index
• 3-axis read: protein / carb balance / fiber
• Honest withheld responses when the photo's unclear
• Encrypted in transit, analyzed once, deleted from server

description_4000char:
Mirrorbite is the food-reveal app that won't invent numbers it can't see.

One photo of your meal. Sixty seconds. You get a directional read — a 0 to 100 index, three nutritional axes (protein, carb balance, fiber), one strength, one next-meal hook. No grams. No invented numbers.

When we're unsure, we tell you. We hold back instead of guessing.

FREE TO TRY:
• 3 free reveals every calendar month — no card needed, no trial countdown
• Refills automatically on the 1st of each month
• Subscribe only after you've tasted what we do

FOR PEOPLE WHO:
• Want directional feedback, not medical diagnosis
• Don't trust photo-based calorie counts (because the math doesn't work)
• Won't pay before knowing if an app is honest with them

HOW IT WORKS:
• Snap a meal. Up to 60-second read.
• See your index 0-100. Categorical axes (good / caution / low).
• Get one specific dinner tweak: "Add a side of beans — fiber like that could meaningfully lift your index."
• If we can't read the photo clearly, we say "I held back this one." That's not a bug — that's the feature. (Withheld reads don't count against your free quota.)

ABOUT OUR LIMITS:
Independent research shows photo-only nutrition estimates have roughly ±30% variance at best. Pretending otherwise creates fake confidence. Mirrorbite stays directional on purpose.

PRICING:
• 3 free reveals per month — always
• Unlimited: $6.99 / week or $39.99 / year (save 89%)
• Auto-renews unless cancelled at least 24h before period end. Payment charged to your Apple ID at confirmation of purchase.
• Manage or cancel anytime in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions.
• Apple Small Business Program member (15% Apple cut)

PRIVACY:
• Your photo is encrypted in transit, analyzed once, then deleted from our server.
• We never store images or use them to train models.
• Directional feedback only. Mirrorbite is not medical advice and not a substitute for a registered dietitian.

NOT:
• A calorie counter (we don't invent numbers)
• A medical app (we are not your dietitian)
• A barcode scanner or food log (photo-first only)

Try it free. If we're not for you, walk away — no card on file.

— Built by a tiny team that wanted honest food feedback.

QUESTIONS? hello@starving-effort.com

in_app_purchases._pricing_note: Aligned with Mau Lazymaxxers Prayer Lock pricing pattern ($6.99 / wk). Keeps single-tap price under Apple's predatory-pricing watchlist while preserving Save-vs-yearly anchor effect. productID intentionally has no price-baked suffix (was mb_weekly_999_usa) for future change resilience.
in_app_purchases.review_notes: Weekly subscription. Auto-renews 24h before period ends. Cancel anytime in iOS Settings.

in_app_purchases._pricing_note: $39.99 / year sits ~43% below Cal AI ($69.99) — primary differentiation lever for 'switch from Cal AI' positioning. productID intentionally has no price-baked suffix (was mb_annual_4999_usa) for future change resilience.
in_app_purchases._promo_offer_note: Retention discount offer planned for Phase 1 (post-launch). Not enabled at v1.0 launch to avoid Misleading-subscription reject. Implement via App Store Connect Promotional Offers + RevenueCat package once first batch of 1000 subscribers is reached.
in_app_purchases.review_notes: Annual subscription, default-selected in paywall. Auto-renewable. Cancel via Apple ID Settings → Subscriptions.

subscription_group.name: mirrorbite_main
subscription_group.subscription_disclosure_en: Mirrorbite Pro unlocks daily reveals with directional nutrition feedback. Auto-renewable subscription. Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal turned off by going to Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions after purchase. Terms apply.
subscription_group.renewal_disclosure_short: Auto-renews until canceled. Cancel anytime in Settings.

age_rating_questionnaire.medical_treatment_information: None — Mirrorbite returns categorical directional nutrition assessments only, never medical advice. Explicit non-medical disclaimer present in app and Terms.
age_rating_questionnaire.user_generated_content: None (no upload to others, photos are not stored)
age_rating_questionnaire._note: medical_treatment_information set to None: Mirrorbite refuses to output specific calorie/gram numbers and explicitly disclaims medical advice. Category Health & Fitness is editorial/lifestyle, not medical.

ai_label_compliance.ai_provider_primary: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (via Cloudflare Worker proxy)
ai_label_compliance.ai_purpose: Analyzing meal photos to return a categorical directional nutrition assessment (0-100 index, 3 axes, strength + improvement bullets, identified dish, confidence level).
user_disclosure_locations: Frame 0 (Privacy) onboarding — 'analyzed once, deleted from our server' + 'We never invent numbers we can't see'
Reveal-delivered screen footer — 'Directional only. Not medical advice.'
Reveal-withheld screen body — 'Mirrorbite never invents numbers it can't see.'
ai_label_compliance.rationale_for_no_opt_out: AI analysis is the core product. Users who do not want AI processing should not use the app. This is disclosed in Frame 0 onboarding before any photo capture.

app_review_information.test_account_notes: No login. Onboarding includes a free sample reveal in ~30 seconds — Reviewer experiences the full product before any paywall. After onboarding, the camera home shows history thumbnails that open pre-generated sample reveals without subscription.
app_review_information.demo_walkthrough: Fast path for Reviewer (30 seconds total): 1) Frame 0 → Got it. 2) A3 sample reveal auto-shows (free experience, no paywall yet). 3) Tap Continue → paywall appears. 4) Tap the × in the top-right (visible after 5s, Apple HIG) → camera home. 5) Tap any history thumbnail to see additional sample reveals (delivered + withheld) without subscribing. Optional: build with EXPO_PUBLIC_REVIEW_MODE=1 skips onboarding entirely.
app_review_information.vision_api_proxy: Cloudflare Worker at https://mirrorbite-vision-proxy.forvyrcompany.workers.dev — we proxy Gemini 2.5 Flash + Claude Sonnet 4 server-side so API keys never reach the client.
app_review_information.privacy_note: Photos are sent encrypted (HTTPS) to our Worker (Cloudflare edge), forwarded to Google Gemini and (for low-confidence cases) Anthropic Claude, analyzed once, and deleted. We never store images or use them to train models. Disclosed in Frame 0, Privacy Policy §3, and AI label.
app_review_information.subscription_note: Weekly $6.99 / yearly $39.99 (default-selected, save 89%). Onboarding provides a free sample reveal before the paywall. Paywall close × appears after 5s per Apple HIG. Restore Purchases button on paywall. Cancellation managed via Apple ID Settings.
app_review_information.health_claim_disclaimer: Mirrorbite returns CATEGORICAL directional indices (good / caution / low), NEVER specific gram amounts, calorie numbers, or medical advice. Disclaimers present on Frame 0, every Reveal screen footer, and Reveal-withheld card. Not a substitute for a registered dietitian.

health_fitness: Other Health Fitness — directional nutrition assessments only, no medical data
user_content: Photos — sent encrypted, analyzed once, deleted from server
identifiers: Device ID — for RevenueCat subscription tracking only
purchases: Purchase History — for subscription management via RevenueCat
usage_data: Product Interaction — anonymous app open / reveal count for retention metrics
diagnostics: Crash Data — anonymous via Expo / EAS
